item.title: Showtime Website History
item.description: For now, this is a gitinfo tryout: (see https://gohugo.io/methods/page/gitinfo/) GitInfo: Gitinfo: AbbreviatedHash: bf8d549 AuthorDate: 2026-07-20 AuthorEmail: mahrukh@startupistan.org AuthorName: MahRukh-Aman CommitDate: 2026-07-20 Hash: bf8d549518d009d01cbd85932c021f485f331e09 Subject: B4 - mr-training-mit-stressanpassung (#511)
